motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def bestClosingTime(self, customers):
    n = len(customers)
    penalty = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if customers[i] == 'Y':
            penalty += 1
        else:
            penalty -= 1
    return penalty

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
